headline: Elevance Health’s Digital Equity Push Reframes Virtual Care And Investor Narrative
summary: Elevance Health (NYSE:ELV) has introduced new digital equity initiatives aimed at closing gaps in access to virtual healthcare. Programs such as "Get Connected for Health" and the expansion of CareBridge focus on technology, connectivity, and tailored support for underserved and vulnerable populations. The initiatives are designed to embed digital equity into Elevance Health's core care model, widening access to telehealth and personalized digital tools. Elevance Health, a large U.S. health...
